message:
test: pin termios.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_termios.rs covering cfgetispeed/cfgetospeed/
cfsetispeed/cfsetospeed (10 baud rates round-trip), tcgetattr/tcsetattr
on a posix_openpt() PTY master, and ENOTTY on non-tty fd. 7 tests pass.

Discovered DISC-TERMIOS-001: fl::tcgetattr uses TCGETS while modern
glibc uses TCGETS2; CIBAUD bits in c_cflag (0x100f0000) are stripped by
fl. Test masks them when comparing and logs the divergence; bd-tmio2
opened to switch fl to TCGETS2.

cfsetispeed invalid-speed handling: fl rejects, glibc accepts. Both are
POSIX-conformant per implementation-defined clause; logged not failed.

Beads: bd-tmio1 (harness), bd-tmio2 (TCGETS2 fix)
